label: ngsTracts CO/NCO/DCO/MOSAIC classifier
description: Typed envelope (post-normalize) over per-tract event class + indiv + chrom + start_bp + end_bp + flags. STEP_TRC_01 output bridged via adapter.

label: per-(chrom × dyad) CO/DCO/NCO counts
description: co_count, dco_count, nco_count + co_per_mb, dco_per_mb per (chrom × dyad). Karyo-stratified rows (homA/het/homB) when karyotype_at_focal_inv present.

label: per-(tested chrom × local inversion) covariate matrix
description: Filtered subset of inversion_candidates.v1 used as covariate context for the interchromosomal page; length_bp derived from end-start+1.

label: per-(focal_inv × parent) null-model assignment
description: Joined from family_hubs.v1 + inversion_karyotypes.v1. Provides permutation_block (family_id by default) for shuffle-within-block null.

label: per-(chrom × interval_a × interval_b) c-coincidence
description: c = r_ab / (r_a · r_b). neg_interference_threshold flagging. Both un-stratified (relatedness coincidence page) and karyo-stratified (interchromosomal page) modes.

label: per-candidate sex-specific CO ideogram + telomere curve
description: Per-inversion-candidate JSON: candidate_span, events[chrom,pos,sex,indiv,in_span], telomere_curve. Consumer also includes genome-atlas page3 CO-density sub-track (cross-atlas read).

label: per-candidate NCO/GC tract ideogram + telomere curve
description: Per-inversion-candidate JSON: candidate_span, tracts[chrom,start_bp,end_bp,kind∈nco|gc,indiv,in_span], telomere_curve. Sister to crossover_track.

label: PRDM9 PWM from CO ±2kb hotspots
description: { pwm: N×4 ACGT PWM | null, tool, evalue, n_hotspots }. Embedded on same per-candidate crossover JSON. Optional — page hides logo card when pwm null.

label: NCO enrichment inside vs outside inversion (cohort, MOSAIC_SHORT × inside-inv)
description: CHAIN OUTPUT (cohort v1). { target_class, n_inside_target, n_outside_target, n_inside_other_nco_like, n_outside_other_nco_like, odds_ratio, log_odds, p_fisher_two_sided, p_fisher_one_sided_greater } + summary. Manuscript NCO headline (MOSAIC_SHORT × inside-inv).

label: CO_rate(het) vs CO_rate(non-het) per chromosome (Welch's t)
description: CHAIN OUTPUT (per-chrom v1). Per chromosome: { n_dyads_het, n_dyads_non_het, mean_co_per_mb_het, mean_co_per_mb_non_het, rate_ratio_het_over_non_het, welch_t, welch_df, p_two_sided, flag_below_threshold }. Manuscript intrachromosomal-suppression signal.

label: HEADLINE: focal inversion karyotype → meiosis on OTHER chromosomes
description: CHAIN OUTPUT (HEADLINE v1). Per (focal_inversion × tested_chrom): { is_focal_chrom, n_het, n_nonhet, mean_diff, t_stat, p_value (permutation), p_bh, p_bonf, sig_flag, local_inv_burden }. Focal-chrom row included but excluded from BH alpha control.

label: Per-candidate NCO enrichment (Fisher per inversion + BH across the set)
description: CHAIN OUTPUT (v2 per-candidate). One row per inversion candidate with cells + odds ratio + p_fisher + p_bh + p_bonf + sig_flag. Candidates missing chrom/start_bp/end_bp emit skipped=true with null stats.
